section.div: Configure this plugin with repositories you want to feature!

Audit-grade multi-agent orchestration for CLI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, +40 more). HMAC-chained audit log, signed agent cards, per-artefact lineage, air-gap deploy. The orchestrator your compliance team will sign off on. https://bernstein.run

A production-grade algorithmic trading bot for Polymarket's 15-minute BTC price prediction markets. Built with a 7-phase architecture combining multiple signal sources, professional risk management, and self-learning capabilities.
Visualize and share your Github profile in seconds!
